commands.description: Start a new session or resume the existing project-local session.
commands.name: start

commands.description: Mark the local session active again without changing beliefs.
commands.name: resume

commands.description: Summarize current local files and upstream autoclanker status.
commands.name: status

commands.description: Disable the session without deleting the resumable files.
commands.name: off

commands.description: Delete local pi-autoclanker files and the upstream session root.
commands.name: clear

commands.description: Export the current session bundle as machine-readable JSON.
commands.name: export

tools.description: Bootstrap pi-autoclanker session files and upstream session state.
tools.name: autoclanker_init_session

tools.description: Read resumable local state and ask autoclanker for upstream status.
tools.name: autoclanker_session_status

tools.description: Preview or canonicalize rough ideas through autoclanker before apply.
tools.name: autoclanker_preview_beliefs

tools.description: Apply the current belief batch through autoclanker.
tools.name: autoclanker_apply_beliefs

tools.description: Run the checked-in eval surface through autoclanker ingest.
tools.name: autoclanker_ingest_eval

tools.description: Ask autoclanker for a commit recommendation.
tools.name: autoclanker_recommend_commit
